passive.name: Stone Skin
passive.description: Wukong gains stacking armor and max health regeneration while fighting champions and monsters.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{ci|Wukong}} gains {{as|{{sti|'''bonus''' armor}}|armor}} based on level and {{stil|health regeneration}} equal to a portion of {{as|his '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Whenever '''Wukong''' or his ''{{ai|Warrior Trickster|Wukong|clone}}'' damage an enemy {{tip|champion}} or {{tip|monster}}, he generates a stack of ''Strength of Stone'', which stacks up to 5 times.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|Strength of Stone:}} For each stack, '''Wukong''' increases the {{as|'''bonus''' armor}} and {{stil|health regeneration}} gained.
wiki_detail.description:
{{sbc|Innate:}} '''Wukong''' gains {{sti|armor|{{as|{{pp|6 to 10}} '''bonus''' armor}}|armor}} and {{stil|health regeneration|regenerates}} an additional{{ft|{{as|{{fd|0.35}}% of his {{sti|'''maximum''' health}}}} every 5 seconds.|{{as|{{fd|0.07}}% of his {{sti|'''maximum''' health}}}} each second.}}

Whenever '''Wukong''' or his ''{{ai|Warrior Trickster|Wukong|clone}}'' damage an enemy {{tip|champion}} or {{tip|monster}}, he generates a [[stack]] of ''Strength of Stone'' for 5 seconds, refreshing on subsequent hits and stacking up to 5 times. Stacks expire by one every second when the duration ends.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Strength of Stone:}} For each stack,{{ft|''Stone Skin's'' effects are increased by 100%,|'''Wukong''' gains {{as|{{pp|6 to 10}} '''additional bonus''' armor|armor}} and regenerates an additional {{as|{{fd|0.07}}% of his '''maximum''' health}} each second,}}up to a maximum of {{as|{{pp|6*(1+1*5) to 10*(1+1*5)}} '''bonus''' armor}} and {{ft|{{as|{{fd|2.1}}% '''maximum''' health}} regeneration every 5 seconds.|{{as|{{fd|0.42}}% '''maximum''' health}} regeneration each second.}}

Q.name: Crushing Blow
Q.description: Wukong's next attack gains attack range, deals bonus damage, and reduces the target's armor for a few seconds.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{cis|Wukong}} next basic attack within a few seconds will gain {{sti|range|'''bonus''' range}}, deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}, and inflict {{sti|armor penetration|{{as|armor reduction}}}} for a short time.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The cooldown is {{sti|cdr|reduced}} whenever '''Wukong''' or his ''{{ai|Warrior Trickster|Wukong|clone}}'' damage an enemy.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Wukong''' empowers his next [[basic attack]] within 5 seconds to have an {{tip|uncancellable windup}}, gain {{sti|range|'''bonus''' range}}, deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}, and inflict {{sti|armor penetration|{{as|armor reduction}}}} for 3 seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Crushing Blow's'' {{sti|cooldown}} is reduced by {{fd|0.5}} seconds whenever '''Wukong''' or his ''{{ai|Warrior Trickster|Wukong|clone}}'' damage an enemy.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Crushing Blow {{tip|basic attack reset|resets}} '''Wukong's''' and his {{ai|Warrior Trickster|Wukong|clone's}} basic attack timer. Other abilities can be used during the attack's animation.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Crushing Blow'' triggers on {{tip|turret|structures}} and {{tip|ward|wards}} but the armor reduction is not applied.
* Pressing ''S'' will cancel the animation and the attack will still land, but '''Wukong''' will not be able to move until it lands.

W.name: Warrior Trickster
W.description: Wukong becomes Invisible and dashes in a direction, leaving behind a clone that will attack nearby enemies.
W.tooltip:
Wukong dashes and becomes Invisible for {{ stealthduration }} second, leaving behind a stationary Clone for {{ cloneduration }} seconds.

The Clone Attacks nearby enemies Wukong has recently damaged and will mimic his ultimate, each dealing {{ clonedamagemod*100 }}% of normal damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Wukong}} enters brief {{tip|invisibility}} and {{tip|dash|dashes}} to the target location, leaving behind a {{tip|clone}} that remains for a short time.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The clone will basic attack autonomously and gain the effects of his other abilities, as well as cast ''{{ai|Cyclone|Wukong}}''.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Wukong''' enters {{tip|invisibility}} for 1 second and {{tip|dash|dashes}} in the target direction, leaving behind a {{tip|clone}} of himself at his casting position for {{fd|3.25}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: The clone is {{tip|untargetable}} to allies and can basic attack autonomously, prioritizing the last enemy '''Wukong''' damaged. It can also gain the effects of ''{{ai|Crushing Blow|Wukong}}'' and ''{{ais|Nimbus Strike|Wukong}}'' {{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}, and casts ''{{ai|Cyclone|Wukong}}'' whenever '''Wukong''' does.
wiki_detail.description3: The clone deals reduced outgoing damage.
wiki_detail.description4: ''See [[Wukong/LoL#Pets|Pets]] for more details about '''Wukong's''' clone. '''Wukong''' can cast any of his [[champion ability|abilities]] during the dash. Warrior Trickster will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* Casting ''Warrior Trickster'' during an ability's effects will transfer them to the clone.
* {{tip|Turret}} shots instantly kill the clone.
* The clone is immune to {{tip|stasis}} and {{ui|Blast Cone}}.
* The clone can still be targeted by allied {{tip|auto-targeted}} effects (e.g. {{si|Heal}}, {{ai|Celestial Blessing|Kayle}}).
* Using a basic attack breaks the stealth at the end of the attack windup.
wiki_detail.tips: * Pressing the {{tt|''S'' key|A key bind that exists in-game that stops a champion in place while moving}} (or Ctrl-5) is special cased for '''Wukong''' to instantly snap into his idle animation like his clone would, which can be used to trick his opponents.

E.name: Nimbus Strike
E.description: Wukong dashes to a targeted enemy and sends out images to attack enemies near his target, dealing damage to each enemy struck.
E.tooltip:
Wukong dashes to an enemy, sending out Clones that mimic the dash to up to {{ extratargets }} additional enemies nearby. Each enemy struck takes {{ totaldamage }} magic damage. He and his Clone gain {{ attackspeed*100 }}% Attack Speed for {{ attackspeedduration }} seconds.

{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Wukong}} {{tip|dashes}} to the target enemy and sends {{tip|untargetable}} clones to briefly attack up to two surrounding enemies, dealing {{as|magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Upon arrival, '''Wukong''' gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} for a few seconds.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Wukong''' {{tip|dashes}} to the target enemy's location and sends out {{tip|untargetable}} ''clones'' to strike up to two additional enemies near the target's location, dealing {{as|magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.description2: Upon arrival, '''Wukong''' gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} for 5 seconds.
wiki_detail.description3: ''{{ai|Crushing Blow|Wukong}} can be cast during the dash.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* The ''clones'' can block non-targeted attacks or abilities for {{fd|0.25}} seconds after hitting their targets.
* ''Nimbus Strike'' has an offset distance of 75 units from the target dashed to.
* The ability applies a stack of {{ri|Electrocute}} / {{ri|Phase Rush}} even if the target is {{tip|untargetable}}.
* The created ''clones'' are considered champions for {{ii|Turret Plating|Turret Plating's}} {{g|gold}} sharing.

R.name: Cyclone
R.description:
Wukong's extends his staff and spins it around repeatedly, gaining Move Speed.

Enemies struck take damage and are knocked up.
R.tooltip:
Wukong gains {{ movespeed*100 }}% Move Speed and spins his staff, Knocking Up nearby enemies for {{ knockupduration }} seconds and take {{ totaldamagett }} plus {{ percenthpdamagett }} max Health physical damage over {{ spinduration }} seconds.

This Ability can be cast a second time within {{ recastwindow }} seconds before going on cooldown.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Wukong}} spins his staff around for a short time, becoming {{tip|ghosted}} and gaining {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}}. The staff continually deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit based on {{as|their '''maximum''' health}}, and can briefly {{tip|airborne|knock them up}} once.
wiki_detail.blurb2: ''Cyclone'' can be recast within the duration, and does so automatically afterwards.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Wukong''' ends ''Cyclone''. He cast ''Cyclone'' a second time within a period after the first cast has ended.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Wukong''' spins his staff around for up to 2 seconds, becoming {{tip|ghosted}} and gaining {{sti|ms|{{as|20% '''bonus''' movement speed|ms}}}}. The staff deals {{as|physical damage}} every {{fd|0.25}} seconds to enemies hit, and can {{tip|airborne|knock them up}} once for {{fd|0.6}} seconds. ''Cyclone'' will not {{tip|airborne|knock up}} enemies who were already hit by either '''Wukong''' or his ''{{ai|Warrior Trickster|Wukong|clone}}'' within the same cast.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Physical Damage Per Tick|{{as|{{ap|8/8 to 16/8}}% of target's '''maximum''' health}} {{as|(+ {{ap|275/8}}% AD)}}|Total Physical Damage|{{as|{{ap|8 to 16}}% of target's '''maximum''' health}} {{as|(+ 275% AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: ''Cyclone'' can be recast after {{fd|0.5}} seconds within the duration, and does so automatically afterwards or by casting another [[champion ability|ability]].
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Wukong''' ends ''Cyclone''. After 1 second, he can cast ''Cyclone'' a second time within 8 seconds of the first cast.
wiki_detail.leveling3: {{st|Maximum Total Physical Damage|{{as|{{ap|8*2 to 16*2}}% of target's '''maximum''' health}} {{as|(+ {{ap|275*2}}% AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.description4: ''{{ais|Nimbus Strike|Wukong}}'' {{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}} duration is continuously refreshed while spinning.
wiki_detail.description5: ''Cyclone's'' damage is capped at {{pp|200 to 600 for 3|6;11;16}} per second against {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Cyclone'' is special cased to grant stacks of {{ri|Conqueror}} for each tick of damage.
* Casting {{ai|Crushing Blow|Wukong}} will cancel ''Cyclone'' for both '''Wukong''' and his clone. {{ai|Warrior Trickster|Wukong}} and {{ai|Nimbus Strike|Wukong}} will only interrupt '''Wukong's''' ''Cyclone''.
* ''Cyclone's'' remaining duration always stays the same even after the clone replicated the ability.
* During ''Cyclone'', '''Wukong''' and his clone's {{sti|attack ranges|link=range}} are reduced{{ft|to 50|by 125}}.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will block one instance of damage.
** Blocking the {{tip|airborne|knock up}} will still grant immunity to it from either of ''Cyclone's'' casts.
{{ct|attack=false|move=true|cast=Other abilities are disabled for the first {{fd|0.3}} seconds, casting them afterwards interrupts.|items=true|consume=true|spells=true,true,true,false,true|interrupts=death}}
